canonical_definition: A constructed dataset for evaluating hallucination detection in negated text, derived from HaluEval, BamBoo, and SelfCheckGPT-WikiBio by applying post-negation transformations and reassigning hallucination labels based on logical consistency.

definitions.text: A constructed dataset for evaluating hallucination detection in negated text, derived from HaluEval, BamBoo, and SelfCheckGPT-WikiBio by applying post-negation transformations and reassigning hallucination labels based on logical consistency.

relationships.evidence: we conduct this analysis by reconstructing existing hallucination detection benchmarks with negated expressions and introducing NegHalu, a dataset in which hallucination labels are newly assigned to account for the effects of negation.

characterization: A constructed dataset for evaluating hallucination detection in negated text, derived from HaluEval, BamBoo, and SelfCheckGPT-WikiBio by applying post-negation transformations and reassigning hallucination labels based on logical consistency.
